name: Private Cloud Infrastructure
description: VMware Cloud Foundation basierte Future Cloud Infrastructure (FCI) mit SDDC auf Lenovo Servern, beheimatet in klimaneutralen europäischen Rechenzentren mit Legacy-IT-Integration.

issues.detail: Portfolio language is 'en' but description is written in German.
Description lists technology components (VMware, SDDC, Lenovo) but never states what business outcome or value this delivers to the customer.
Naming specific vendors (VMware, Lenovo) ties the feature to procurement details rather than capability value. If vendors change, the description becomes stale.
Missing fields: product, created, status, differentiators, use_cases.
FCI and SDDC are used without explanation. Readers outside T-Systems may not know these abbreviations.
